message:
chore: Bump workspace to v0.3.9 and update dependencies

Workspace version bump 0.3.8 → 0.3.9 for the telemetry diagnostics feature.

Updates all crate versions in the workspace:
- rch: 0.3.9
- rch-common: 0.3.9
- rch-telemetry: 0.3.9
- rchd: 0.3.9

Cargo.lock refresh includes transitive dependency updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
